sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN name1 WHEN '2' THEN name2 WHEN '3' THEN name3 WHEN '4' THEN name4 END name, width, colname FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND LISTTYPE = #listCode# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

SELECT boardid, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN boardname ELSE boardname2 END boardname, treevieworder, boardlevel, parentboardid, boarddescription, itemexpires, attachsizelimit, replynotify, boardgroupid, alertpostitem, gubun, url, deleteafter, boardno, portlet, onelinereply, boardtreepath, formlocation, formflag, apprflag, apprmailflag, attributeyn, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#

SELECT boardid, accessid, accesslevel, access_, parentboardid, boardadmin_fg, listview_fg, read_fg, write_fg, reply_fg, delete_fg, inherit_fg, postnotice, boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND accessid = #userDeptPath# LIMIT 1

SELECT A.boardid, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, A.startdate, A.writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END readflag, A.extensionattribute5, A.writername2, A.writerdeptname2, A.writercompanyname2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = A.tenant_id AND itemid = A.itemid) onelinecnt, A.upperitemidtree, A.docno, '' AS notice, A.maincontent, A.extensionattribute6, A.extensionattribute7, A.extensionattribute8, A.extensionattribute9, A.extensionattribute10, (SELECT gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.boardid = A.boardid) AS gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(userid) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID# AND boardid = #boardID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.itemid = D.itemid WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
A.apprflag = 'Y'
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND D.totalcount IS NULL
AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate#
LIMIT 0, 20
